file:
Schedule a prompt to be enqueued at a future time. Use for both recurring schedules and one-shot reminders.
Uses standard 5-field cron in the user's local timezone.
## One-shot tasks (recurring: false) For "remind me at X" or "at , do Y" requests — fire once then auto-delete.
## Recurring jobs (recurring: true, the default) For "every N minutes" / "every hour".
## Avoid :00 and :30 minute marks Pick an off-minute like :07 or :57 instead of :00 unless exact time is requested.
## Runtime behavior Recurring tasks auto-expire after 3 days. Mention this 3-day limit to the user.
Returns a job ID you can pass to ${CRON_DELETE_TOOL_NAME}.
